description: Dolt SQL Server metrics from the Prometheus /metrics endpoint (dss_*, process_*, go_*, sys_*).

panels.description: Clients connected to this Dolt SQL server instance.
panels.title: Concurrent connections

panels.description: Encoded Dolt version as exposed by dss_dolt_version (implementation detail of the binary).
panels.title: Dolt version (metric)

panels.description: Estimated query latency from dss_query_duration histogram.
panels.title: Query duration (histogram_quantile)

panels.description: Summary quantiles are exposed as quantile=1 or 1.0 depending on the client; some scrapers omit the top quantile. Average STW pause uses _sum/_count and is always present.
panels.title: GC pause (summary vs avg)

panels.description: Host-level utilization as reported by Dolt (0–100 scale).
panels.title: System CPU / memory / disk usage

title: Dolt SQL Server
